text: I can't believe you got me tickets to the concert! This is the best birthday surprise ever!
speaker: Sarah
conversation_context: Mike: Hey, I have something for you. Close your eyes. Sarah: Okay, what is it?

text: You promised you would be there for my presentation. I really needed your support today.
speaker: David
conversation_context: Lisa: I'm sorry I missed your presentation. Something came up at work. David: Something always comes up.

text: Wait, you're telling me we won the contract? Are you serious right now?
speaker: Jennifer
conversation_context: Mark: I just got off the phone with the client. Jennifer: And? What did they say?

text: I don't want to talk about it. Just leave me alone for a while.
speaker: Tom
conversation_context: Rachel: Tom, I heard about what happened at the office. Are you okay? Tom: Not really.

text: That was absolutely disgusting. I can't believe they served that to customers.
speaker: Elena
conversation_context: James: How was your meal? Elena: Don't even ask. There was a hair in my soup.

text: I'm so worried about the results. What if something is wrong?
speaker: Maria
conversation_context: Carlos: The doctor said they would call with the test results today. Maria: I know, I've been checking my phone every five minutes.

text: That's interesting. I'll review the report and get back to you by Friday.
speaker: Alex
conversation_context: Patricia: Here are the quarterly numbers you asked for. Alex: Thanks for putting this together.

text: How could you say that about her behind her back? I thought you were better than that.
speaker: Nina
conversation_context: Chris: Did you hear what happened with Emily? She totally messed up the project. Nina: Chris, Emily is your friend.

text: You got the promotion! I knew they would recognize all your hard work. I'm so happy for you!
speaker: Kevin
conversation_context: Amanda: Kevin, sit down. I have some news from the meeting. Kevin: What happened?

text: I just found out they cancelled the entire program. Three years of research, gone just like that.
speaker: Dr. Chen
conversation_context: Dr. Patel: Did you see the email from the department head? Dr. Chen: Which email?
